LanguageData.VAE_HazardProtection.description: Develop suits resistant to high toxicity and radiation.
LanguageData.VAE_HazardProtection.label: hazard protection
LanguageData.VAE_LeatherTanning.description: Learn the process of tanning to craft more thicker and durable armors.
LanguageData.VAE_LeatherTanning.label: leather tanning
LanguageData.VAE_MlitaryCamouflage.description: Craft special military apparel allowing users to resemble the background environment such as foliage.
LanguageData.VAE_MlitaryCamouflage.label: military camouflage
LanguageData.VAE_SiegebreakerArmor.description: Craft siegebreaker armor, heavy powered armor that significantly slows the user but provides advanced protection at range. Note that these also require advanced components.
LanguageData.VAE_SiegebreakerArmor.label: siegebreaker armor
LanguageData.VAE_TrooperArmor.description: Craft trooper armor, a light semi-powered armor that is lightweight and cheap to produce. Note that these also require advanced components.
LanguageData.VAE_TrooperArmor.label: trooper armor
LanguageData.VAE_HazardProtection.generalRules.rulesS: subject_story->engineered suits that turn toxic wastelands into walkable lands
subject_story->developed radiation shields woven into the fabric of uniforms
subject_story->created attire that allows safe research in deadly environments
LanguageData.VAE_LeatherTanning.generalRules.rulesStr: subject_story->rediscovered ancient tanning recipes for unmatched durability
subject_story->introduced waterproofing techniques that defy harsh weathers
subject_story->crafted armors that blend tradition with battlefield necessity
LanguageData.VAE_MlitaryCamouflage.generalRules.rules: subject_story->designed gear that mimics the environment, making soldiers invisible
subject_story->studied animals' camouflage to apply their patterns to military apparel
subject_story->outfitted scouts with wear that blends seamlessly into surroundings
LanguageData.VAE_SiegebreakerArmor.generalRules.rules: subject_story->forged armor that withstands artillery, turning soldiers into walking tanks
subject_story->integrated advanced tech for unmatched endurance on the battlefield
subject_story->developed exoskeletons that bear the brunt, safeguarding the wearer
LanguageData.VAE_TrooperArmor.generalRules.rulesStrin: subject_story->innovated with lightweight materials for rapid troop deployment
subject_story->balanced protection with mobility, setting new standards for combat gear
subject_story->pioneered the use of semi-powered armor in skirmishes
